'''âv-dh-d-sh''' ('''kavadhdeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youthfulize|youthfulize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youthfulize|youthfulize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-dh-d-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kavadhdeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadhdeshoko|thivadhdeshoko]] || [[word:jivadhdeshoko|jivadhdeshoko]] || [[word:shivadhdeshoko|shivadhdeshoko]] || [[word:kivadhdeshoko|kivadhdeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadhdeshoko|thuthuvadhdeshoko]] || [[word:jujuvadhdeshoko|jujuvadhdeshoko]] || [[word:shushuvadhdeshoko|shushuvadhdeshoko]] || [[word:kukuvadhdeshoko|kukuvadhdeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovadhdeshoko|thovadhdeshoko]] || [[word:jovadhdeshoko|jovadhdeshoko]] || [[word:shovadhdeshoko|shovadhdeshoko]] || [[word:kovadhdeshoko|kovadhdeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvadhdeshoko|thĂŠvadhdeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvadhdeshoko|jĂŠvadhdeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvadhdeshoko|shĂŠvadhdeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvadhdeshoko|kĂŠvadhdeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavadhdeshoko|thathavadhdeshoko]] || [[word:jajavadhdeshoko|jajavadhdeshoko]] || [[word:shashavadhdeshoko|shashavadhdeshoko]] || [[word:kakavadhdeshoko|kakavadhdeshoko]]
|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavadhdeshithi|shavadhdeshithi]] || [[word:shavadhdeshiji|shavadhdeshiji]] || [[word:shavadhdeshishi|shavadhdeshishi]] || [[word:shavadhdeshiki|shavadhdeshiki]]
